rationale: Physical oceanography (wind-driven surface waves) is a genuinely different specific field from statistical mechanics, so field_match fails. The stated mechanism, a wave-kinetic (Boltzmann-type) collision equation for the spectral energy density admitting Kolmogorov-Zakharov constant-flux power-law stationary spectra, denotes the same specific weak/wave-turbulence machinery as the reference's constant-flux Kolmogorov-type cascade in an integro-differential kinetic equation extracted via the Zakharov transformation, so mechanism_match holds; overall_equivalent is their AND and is false.
